entity.summary: Global centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched under the BitMax name in July 2018, later rebranded as AscendEX, and continuing to offer spot, derivatives, custody, and staking services.
entity.notes: Official company material states that the platform launched as BitMax in July 2018. The former BitMax identity is retained as an alias; the current AscendEX platform remains accessible. HEI retains Singapore as the existing historical origin classification while some current market profiles list another registration jurisdiction.

expected.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the AscendEX brand.

changes.summary: Global centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched under the BitMax name in July 2018, later rebranded as AscendEX, and continuing to offer spot, derivatives, custody, and staking services.
changes.notes: Official company material states that the platform launched as BitMax in July 2018. The former BitMax identity is retained as an alias; the current AscendEX platform remains accessible. HEI retains Singapore as the existing historical origin classification while some current market profiles list another registration jurisdiction.

events.title: BitMax launched in July 2018
events.description: The centralized exchange later known as AscendEX launched under the BitMax name in July 2018.
events.notes: The reviewed sources establish July 2018 but not an exact public launch day, so the first day of the month is used as a month-level marker.

events.title: AscendEX hot wallets were breached
events.description: AscendEX identified unauthorized transfers from hot-wallet infrastructure across several networks on December 11, 2021 and temporarily suspended deposits and withdrawals while rebuilding affected infrastructure.
events.notes: The incident caused a temporary service restriction but did not establish a terminal shutdown; the exchange later resumed services and remains active.

evidence.title: AscendEX announces a $50 million Series B raise
evidence.notes: Official company announcement states that AscendEX launched under the BitMax name in July 2018.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for AscendEX
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the AscendEX and BitMax identities and a 2018 establishment year.

evidence.title: Dec. 11 Security Incident Report
evidence.notes: Official post-incident report documents unauthorized access to hot-wallet infrastructure and transfers across multiple networks.

evidence.title: Hackers drain more than $77 million from AscendEX hot wallets
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous independent reporting corroborates the December 11 breach and estimated losses.

evidence.title: AscendEX official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current AscendEX identity and active exchange interface.
